raw_consumer_statement: I filed a dispute because XXXX ( a hotel booking app ) lied. They put the price at XXXX for 2 nights then after I checked out, the app said I need to pay another XXXX at the hotel so the total is XXXX. I'm not paying for that so I reached out to the hotel and they ignored my message. American Express closed the case with the reason : As per your CM Agreement and/or merchant policies, we are unable to investigate this charge. Please contact the merchant directly. However, I didn't get any communication from Amex regarding this. This dispute was in XXXX. I just realized I have to pay for this because I filed a new dispute for something else and this popped up. I reached out to Amex and they said they sent me the email already and there was something wrong with my email.
